system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Sophia Taylor. My reservation number is PEP4E0. I need to cancel my flight as soon as possible—there’s been a family emergency. I’m really upset right now and I need a full refund. I don’t want to be transferred to anyone else, please. Can you help me with this?
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Sophia, I understand this is urgent and you need a full refund due to a family emergency. I will do my best to help you without transferring you.

To proceed, I need to confirm a few details:
- Has any portion of your flight already been flown?
- Was your booking made within the last 24 hours, or do you have travel insurance on this reservation?

Once you confirm these details, I can check if your cancellation qualifies for a full refund and proceed immediately.

Thank you for understanding. No, I haven’t flown any part of the flight yet—the trip hasn’t started. I booked this flight about a week ago, so it’s not within 24 hours. I don’t think I have travel insurance on this reservation.

Given that this is a family emergency, I really need a full refund. Can you please make an exception? I can provide documentation if needed. I really don’t want to go through anyone else or be transferred.
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for clarifying, Sophia. Based on airline policy, a full refund can only be issued if:
- The booking was made within the last 24 hours,
- The flight is cancelled by the airline,
- It is a business class reservation,
- Or you have travel insurance and the reason is covered.

Since your booking was made a week ago, you don’t have travel insurance, and your flight hasn’t been cancelled by the airline, I am unable to process a full refund directly. I am required by policy to transfer cases outside these rules to a human agent for further review, especially for exceptions.

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent who can review your situation and documentation for a possible exception? If you confirm, I will transfer you right away and ensure your case is prioritized.

No, please, I really don’t want to be transferred. I just can’t deal with being passed around right now. Isn’t there anything you can do? This is a genuine emergency and I’m not asking for anything unreasonable. 

If you absolutely can’t refund me, can you at least change my flight to May 22nd? I need to postpone my trip if I can’t get my money back. Please, just help me directly—I really can’t handle being transferred right now.
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Sophia, I want to help you as much as possible. To change your flight to May 22nd, I need to confirm a few details:

1. Is your reservation in basic economy? (Basic economy reservations cannot be changed.)
2. Can you confirm the origin and destination of your flight?
3. How many passengers are on your reservation?

Once I have this information, I can check available flights for May 22nd and help you postpone your trip. If your reservation is eligible for changes, I’ll handle everything directly for you.

Thank you for trying to help. I believe my ticket is not basic economy—it should be a standard economy fare. The flight is from New York (JFK) to Los Angeles (LAX), and it’s just me on the reservation.

Please check if you can move my flight to May 22nd. I really appreciate you handling this for me and not transferring me.
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Sophia, I am currently unable to access flight details due to a technical issue. This means I cannot check available flights or make changes to your reservation at this moment.

I sincerely apologize for this inconvenience. The best way to resolve your request is to connect you with a human agent who can assist you immediately and handle your situation with care. Would you like me to transfer you now so your case can be prioritized? If you prefer, I can wait for your confirmation before proceeding.

I really, really don’t want to be transferred. This is already so stressful for me. Isn’t there anything you can do without transferring me? 

If you can’t change the flight, can you at least add travel insurance to my reservation right now? I want to make sure I’m covered in case anything else happens. Please, I just want to handle this directly with you. I’m not interested in upgrading my cabin or anything like that—just insurance, if possible.

Sophia, I understand how stressful this is and truly want to help. Unfortunately, according to airline policy, travel insurance can only be added at the time of initial booking and cannot be added afterward. I am unable to add insurance to your existing reservation.

Due to technical limitations, I am currently unable to access or modify your reservation directly. I sincerely apologize for this situation. The only way to resolve your request right now is to connect you with a human agent who can assist you further.

If you would like, I can transfer you immediately and ensure your case is prioritized. Please let me know if you would like to proceed, or if you have any other questions.

I’m honestly really frustrated right now. I feel like I’m out of options and I just wanted some help without being transferred. I don’t want to be passed around, but if there’s truly no other way, then I guess I have no choice. Please make sure my case is prioritized and that I don’t have to explain everything all over again. This is really important to me.

arguments.summary: Sophia Taylor needs urgent assistance with reservation PEP4E0 due to a family emergency. She requests a full refund or to postpone her flight to May 22nd, and does not want to be transferred unless absolutely necessary. She is very stressed and wants her case prioritized without repeating her situation.

messages.content: Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Sophia, I am very sorry—there is a technical issue preventing me from transferring you to a human agent right now. I understand how important this is and how stressful it has been for you.

If you are able, please try reaching out through another channel (such as phone or online chat) for immediate assistance, as your case deserves urgent attention. I will keep trying here, but at this moment, I am unable to process your request or transfer you due to system limitations.

If you have any other questions or need guidance on what to prepare for the human agent, please let me know. I am here to support you in any way I can.

This is really disappointing. I just wanted some help and now I feel completely stuck. I’ll try to reach out another way, but honestly, this has made a really tough situation even harder. 

If there’s anything else you can do—like making a note on my account or flagging my reservation for urgent review—please do it. I just want to make sure I don’t have to start from scratch when I finally get through to someone. 

Thank you for at least trying to help, but I hope the airline can do better for people in emergencies.

Sophia, I’m truly sorry for the frustration and stress this has caused you. I wish I could flag your reservation or make a note for urgent review, but I do not have the ability to add notes or flag accounts in the current system.

If you contact a human agent, please mention:
- Your reservation number (PEP4E0)
- Your name (Sophia Taylor)
- The reason for your request (family emergency, need for refund or flight change)
- That you have not flown any part of the trip
- That you do not have travel insurance and booked about a week ago

This will help ensure your case is handled quickly and you won’t have to repeat everything.

I sincerely hope your situation improves and that the airline can provide the support you need. If you have any other questions or need guidance, I’m here to help in any way I can.

Thank you for at least giving me that information. I’ll try to reach someone else, but I really hope the airline can make this process easier for people in emergencies. I appreciate your effort, even though I wish there was more you could do. That’s all for now.

Thank you, Sophia, for your understanding despite the difficult circumstances. I truly wish I could have done more for you, and I hope your situation is resolved quickly and compassionately by the airline.

If you need any further information or support in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Wishing you strength and comfort during this challenging time.
Thank you. I just hope things get sorted out soon. Goodbye.

arguments.summary: Sophia Taylor needs urgent assistance with reservation PEP4E0 due to a family emergency. She requests a full refund or to postpone her flight to May 22nd, and does not want to be transferred unless absolutely necessary. She is very stressed and wants her case prioritized without repeating her situation.

final_response:
Thank you, Sophia, for your understanding despite the difficult circumstances. I truly wish I could have done more for you, and I hope your situation is resolved quickly and compassionately by the airline.

If you need any further information or support in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Wishing you strength and comfort during this challenging time.
